title: Organization Summary
description: Get organization-level aggregated metrics including campaign counts, budget, ROAS, impressions, clicks, revenue, and walk-ins.

steps.title: Understand organization data
steps.description: Organization data includes name, configuration, and aggregated campaign metrics through the `orgSummary` relation. You can access org data either directly (requires org-level permissions) or through campaign relations (works with all permissions).

steps.title: Get org summary via campaigns
steps.description: Fetch organization summary through the campaign advertiser relation. This approach works with all permission levels.
steps.tip: This query works with all permission levels. The advertiser relation provides access to org data through campaigns.

steps.title: Understand summary fields
steps.description:
The orgSummary object contains:

**Campaign Counts:**
- **totalCampaigns**: Total number of campaigns
- **activeCampaigns**: Campaigns with remaining budget
- **liveCampaigns**: Currently serving campaigns
- **inAttributionCampaigns**: Campaigns in attribution window

**Performance Metrics:**
- **impressions**: Total impressions served (string for large numbers)
- **mediaSpendClicks**: Total clicks
- **mediaSpendCTR**: Click-through rate
- **roas**: Return on ad spend

**Financial:**
- **budget**: Total allocated budget
- **mediaSpendBudgetSpent**: Amount spent
- **totalRevenue**: Total attributed revenue

**Conversions:**
- **totalOrders**: Total attributed orders
- **totalWalkIns**: Total walk-in visits
- **totalObservations**: Total tracked observations
steps.tip: liveCampaigns vs activeCampaigns helps identify paused campaigns.

steps.title: Direct org query
steps.description: For users with org-level access: fetch organization details directly with full summary metrics.
steps.query:
query GetOrgWithSummary($orgId: ID!) {
  org(where: { id: $orgId }) {
    id
    name
    website
    domain
    zone
    level
    orgSummary {
      id
      totalCampaigns
      activeCampaigns
      liveCampaigns
      inAttributionCampaigns
      impressions
      budget
      roas
      mediaSpendImpressionsServed
      mediaSpendClicks
      mediaSpendCTR
      mediaSpendBudgetSpent
      totalWalkIns
      totalOrders
      totalRevenue
      totalObservations
      goal
    }
  }
}
steps.tip: This query requires org-level access permissions. Use the campaign-based query above if you get 'Not Authorised' errors.

steps.title: List all organizations
steps.description: For users with org-level access: list multiple organizations with their summaries.
steps.tip: This query requires org-level access permissions. Use orderBy: createdAt_DESC to show most recent orgs first.

tips: Use campaignOrdersConnection with advertiser.orgSummary for universal access
Direct org queries require elevated permissions
orgSummary is cached - data may be slightly delayed for real-time updates
level indicates organization tier (PARTNER, ADVERTISER, etc.)
zone field shows the organization's timezone setting
impressions is returned as a string to handle large numbers
Combine orgSummary with campaign-level queries for detailed breakdowns
